data.title: UPDATE test: merge-to-main.sh archive phase logs PRECONDITIONS summary with mixed-format support
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Update existing merge-to-main tests to assert that the archive phase reads PRECONDITIONS events and includes a summary in its output. Specifically assert: (a) rollout tickets show their PRECONDITIONS summary, (b) legacy/pre-rollout tickets show "pre-manifest" in the archive summary (mixed-format archives render correctly). Tests must fail RED before merge-to-main.sh is updated.

## Existing Test Files to Modify
- `tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh` — add 2 test functions

## .test-index RED markers required
- `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh: tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh [test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh: tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh [test_merge_archive_legacy_ticket_pre_manifest]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary:**
- Given: a merge-to-main run with a ticket that has PRECONDITIONS events; archive phase is triggered
- When: merge-to-main.sh runs through the archive phase
- Then: the phase output contains `preconditions_summary` or `manifest_depth` in the archive log; exit 0

**test_merge_archive_legacy_ticket_pre_manifest:**
- Given: a merge-to-main run with a legacy ticket (zero PRECONDITIONS events) — simulating mixed corpus
- When: merge-to-main.sh runs through the archive phase
- Then: the archive log contains "pre-manifest" for that ticket; phase does not error out; exit 0

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary` added to test-merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary" tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] `test_merge_archive_legacy_ticket_pre_manifest` added to test-merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_merge_archive_legacy_ticket_pre_manifest" tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] Both fail RED (merge-to-main not yet updated)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary 2>&1 | grep -qiE "FAIL|not found"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for both tests
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_merge_archive_includes_preconditions_summary\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Pre-existing merge-to-main tests do not regress
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL" | grep -v "preconditions\|pre_manifest" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
